purpose: mechanically define the already-registered level and target heterogeneity clause for C84-L3

level_rule.compute_level0_Bstar: same registered target-cluster qualification and closure using the four panel-by-seed cells at level 0
level_rule.compute_level1_Bstar: same registered target-cluster qualification and closure using the four panel-by-seed cells at level 1
level_rule.heterogeneity: level0_Bstar differs from level1_Bstar, including one absent and one present

target_composition_rule.operation: omit each target and recompute the complete primary budget curve and Bstar without changing any budget or threshold
target_composition_rule.preservation: LOTO Bstar equals the full-panel dataset Bstar exactly
target_composition_rule.heterogeneity: preservation count is below the dataset minimum

label_taxonomy_binding.C84-L3: activated when the existing cross-dataset ordinal rule fails or any level/target-composition heterogeneity rule above is active
label_taxonomy_binding.C84-L4: unchanged and retains precedence when any full-panel dataset Bstar is absent
